Idioma.LB_Esta_seguro_que_desea_Eliminar_los_Re: Are you sure that desires to Eliminate the Registrations Selected? If it eliminates the registrations selected, will eliminate all the data related to the payroll ny have that recalculate the payroll.
Idioma.LB_Seleccione_el_Registro_que_desea_elim: Select the Registration that desires to eliminate!
Idioma.LB_No_se_pueden_crear_nuevas_relaciones_: New payroll calculation relations can't be created because there is not calendars of definite payment
